india_trends.title: Tesla to expand supercharger network across major Indian cities amid EV push and new model launches
india_trends.summary: Tesla is set to boost its charging network across India's major cities. This expansion includes superchargers and destination charging hubs. The company aims to address customer range anxiety. Tesla plans to establish these facilities in Delhi, Chandigarh, Jaipur, Chennai, Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Mumb

india_trends.title: Global Markets | Japan's Nikkei closes at record high as tech earnings overshadow Mideast concerns
india_trends.summary: Japan's Nikkei set ​a closing record high on ​Friday, capping a third consecutive weekly gain, as enthusiasm ​over technology sector earnings offset uncertainty over a potential peace deal in the Middle East.

india_trends.title: Global Markets | European shares fall, set for weekly loss on Middle East worries
india_trends.summary: European shares fell on ​Friday and were set to end the week lower, as investors remained concerned about the lack of progress toward a resolution to the Middle East conflict, while also ‌keeping a ⁠close ⁠watch on corporate earnings.

india_trends.title: Hindustan Zinc announces Rs 11/share dividend: Check record date, other key details
india_trends.summary: Metals major Hindustan Zinc on Friday declared a first interim dividend of Rs 11 per equity share for the ongoing financial year 2027, with the record date to determine the eligibility of shareholders being fixed on April 30.

india_trends.title: Shriram Finance Q4 Results: Standalone profit jumps 41% YoY to Rs 3,014 crore, NII rises 16%
india_trends.summary: Shriram Finance announced a strong financial performance for the March quarter. The company's standalone net profit surged 41% year-on-year to Rs 3,014 crore. india_trends.title: Multibagger Himadri Speciality shares jump 13% to 14-month high after Q4; up 30% in April
india_trends.summary: Himadri Speciality Chemicals' shares rose 13% to ₹605, reaching a 14-month high. The company reported a 13.5% YoY revenue increase to ₹1,288 crore, with net profit surging 33.5% YoY to ₹207.53 crore, driven by strong performance and strategic focus on value-added products.

india_trends.title: Gold, Silver Outlook: Gold rate set to break 4-week rally; silver price plunges 6% — key levels to watch
india_trends.summary: Gold, Silver Outlook: Gold prices are hovering around ₹1,51,100, below the 20- and 50-day exponential moving averages (EMA) placed at ₹1,52,100 and ₹1,51,100, respectively.

india_trends.title: Pension fund regulator's fee tweak may not be enough to attract NPS distributors
india_trends.summary: Experts suggest that revised commission structures for the National Pension System may not significantly attract distributors. They can now earn a trail commission of 0.20% along with a ₹200 onboarding fee, but earnings remain lower compared to mutual funds.

india_trends.summary: Indian major ports achieved a significant milestone in 2025-26, handling over 915 million tonnes of cargo. This performance surpassed the annual target, reflecting a strong 7.06 percent year-on-year growth. The sector demonstrated enhanced efficiency and a sustained growth trajectory. Investment in

india_trends.title: MCX crude oil prices jump 19% this week so far. What's the outlook ahead?
india_trends.summary: Crude oil prices rose on Friday, 24 April amid fears of military escalation in the Middle East, influenced by Iran's actions in the Strait of Hormuz. Brent crude increased by 1.8% while WTI rose by 0.8%. Geopolitical tensions continue to impact market sentiment and supply concerns.

india_trends.title: Chalet Hotels to acquire 144-room Udaipur resort for Rs 171 crore
india_trends.summary: Chalet Hotels Limited is set to acquire Seasons Hotels Private Limited, the owner of Inder Residency Resort & Spa Udaipur. The deal is valued at Rs 171 crore. This acquisition marks Chalet Hotels' entry into Udaipur. The company plans to upgrade the property into an upper upscale destination.

india_trends.title: Adani Green Q4 Results: Cons PAT jumps 34% YoY to Rs 514 crore; revenue up 16%
india_trends.summary: Adani Green Q4 Results: Adani Green Energy announced impressive financial results for the March quarter. Net profit surged by 34.3% year-on-year.
